title: NVIDIA’s Nemotron 3 Is... Awesome?
summary: NVIDIA released Nemotron 3, a series of open models available in Nano, Super, and Ultra variants. The architecture combines hybrid mamba transformer, MTP (Mixture of Tokens and Predictors), and Latent MoE components to distinguish it from other open models.
writeup: The video examines NVIDIA's Nemotron 3 release, which spans three model sizes: Nano, Super, and Ultra. The architectural focus is the combination of a hybrid Mamba transformer design, Latent Mixture of Experts, and MTP. The discussion also touches on vision transformer components alongside the Mixture of Experts and MTP elements that define the series.
